ddls:
CREATE TABLE "waterbodies" (
  "waterbody_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waterbody */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the waterbody */,
  "town" TEXT /* Town where the waterbody is located */,
  "location_link" TEXT /* Link to the location of the waterbody */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of waterbody */,
  "parking_capacity" TEXT /* Parking capacity at the waterbody */,
  "invasive_species" TEXT /* Invasive species present in the waterbody */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or restrictions for public use */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the managing agency */,
  "area" REAL /* Surface area of the waterbody in square meters */,
  "depth" REAL /* Average depth of the waterbody in meters */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the waterbody */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of inspections */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Information on the accessibility of the waterbody */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waterbody_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waterbodies_town FOREIGN KEY ("town") REFERENCES towns ("town_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waterbodies_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES waterbody_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waterbodies_invasive_species FOREIGN KEY ("invasive_species") REFERENCES invasive_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waterbodies_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "towns" (
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each town */,
  "town_name" TEXT /* Name of the town */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the town is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the town is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the town */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the town */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the town in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each managing agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the managing agency */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the managing agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the managing agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the managing agency */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the managing agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invasive_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invasive species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the invasive species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the invasive species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the invasive species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the invasive species */,
  "control_methods" TEXT /* Methods used to control the invasive species */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the invasive species on the waterbody */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking" (
  "parking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking entry */,
  "waterbody_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waterbody */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Parking capacity */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or restrictions on parking */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Information on the accessibility of the parking area */,
  "gate_opening_hours" TEXT /* Hours when the parking area is open */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_waterbody_id FOREIGN KEY ("waterbody_id") REFERENCES waterbodies ("waterbody_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waterbody_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waterbody type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the waterbody type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the waterbody type */,
  "average_depth" REAL /* Average depth of waterbodies of this type */,
  "common_activities" TEXT /* Common activities associated with this type of waterbody */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "waterbody_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waterbody commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reviewed the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_waterbody_id FOREIGN KEY ("waterbody_id") REFERENCES waterbodies ("waterbody_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public, researcher, conservationist) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the managing agency */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the contact person within the agency */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_contacts_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restrictions" (
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restriction */,
  "waterbody_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waterbody */,
  "restriction_text" TEXT /* Text describing the restriction */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the restriction is effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the restriction will end */,
  "enforcement_agency" TEXT /* Agency responsible for enforcing the restriction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restriction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restrictions_waterbody_id FOREIGN KEY ("waterbody_id") REFERENCES waterbodies ("waterbody_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "waterbody_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waterbody */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., day use, boat rental) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the fee is effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the fee will no longer be effective */,
  "payment_methods" TEXT /* Accepted payment methods */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_waterbody_id FOREIGN KEY ("waterbody_id") REFERENCES waterbodies ("waterbody_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "waterbody_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waterbody */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Information on the availability of the amenity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the amenity, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_waterbody_id FOREIGN KEY ("waterbody_id") REFERENCES waterbodies ("waterbody_id")
)
